metadata.preview:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

display.text:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

<path>/private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/dcp-feature-add-small-1/repo/bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: export function formatTitle(value, mode = 'plain') {
2:   if (mode === 'title') return value.split(/(\w+)/).map((part, i) => i % 2 === 0 ? part[0].toUpperCase() + part.slice(1).toLowerCase() : part).join('')
3:   if (mode === 'upper') return value.toUpperCase()
4:   if (mode === 'lower') return value.toLowerCase()
5:   return value
6: }

(End of file - total 6 lines)
</content>
